delete.summary: Deletes a specific language translation for a menu.

get.summary: Gets the full detail of a single translation for a menu.
Lists all translations for a menu.

post.summary: Triggers AI translation of a menu into one or more target languages.

patch.summary: Activate a tenant menu to make it publicly visible

post.summary: Applies previously imported menu data to an existing menu.

patch.summary: Deactivate a tenant menu to hide it from public view

post.summary: Generates an AI-powered description for a menu item.

Generates AI-estimated nutritional info for a menu item based on its ingredients.
Returns data for frontend preview; does NOT auto-save.
Accepts a menu image or PDF and returns extracted menu data for user review.

delete.summary: Removes the time-based schedule from a menu.

put.summary: Sets or updates a time-based schedule on a menu.

get.summary: Authenticated endpoint for menu owners to view QR scan analytics.

Public endpoint that records a QR code scan and redirects to the public menu page.
No authentication required - this is what customers hit when scanning a QR code.
Public endpoint for viewing active menus without authentication.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Optional BCP-47 language code for serving translated content (e.g., "es", "fr").

get.summary:
Public endpoint to list system dietary tags without authentication.
Returns only predefined (system) tags, never tenant-specific custom tags.

Public API endpoint to get a menu with full details.
Requires API key authentication via X-Api-Key header.

Public API endpoint to get all items for a specific menu (flattened across categories).
Requires API key authentication via X-Api-Key header.

Public API endpoint to list active menus for the authenticated tenant.
Requires API key authentication via X-Api-Key header.

Lists all available starter menu templates.
Authenticated users with any role can browse templates.

post.summary: Creates a new location for the current tenant.

get.summary: Lists all locations for the current tenant.
Gets a single location by its ExternalId.

post.summary: Create a new A/B test experiment for a menu.

get.summary: List all experiments for the current tenant.
Get a specific experiment with its current metrics.

post.summary:
Record a view for a variant of an experiment.
Public endpoint called from the public menu page.
Always returns 204 regardless of outcome (analytics must not break the public page).
Start a draft experiment, transitioning it to Running status.
Stop a running experiment, calculate the winner, and complete it.
Creates a custom dietary tag for the current tenant.

get.summary: Lists available dietary tags (system + tenant custom) for authenticated admin users.

post.summary: Adds a custom domain for the current tenant.

get.summary:
Gets the custom domain for the current tenant.
Returns the domain configuration or null if no domain is configured.

Internal endpoint to check if a domain is already claimed.
Returns 200 if the domain is claimed, 404 if available.
No information disclosure — no body returned.

Public endpoint to resolve a custom domain to a menu ExternalId.
Returns 200 with the menu ExternalId, or 404 for unknown/inactive domains.

post.summary:
Requests re-verification of a custom domain.
Resets the domain to PendingVerification status.

get.summary:
Authenticated endpoint for menu owners to view detailed menu analytics
with date-range filtering, device breakdown, and top-viewed items.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of the date range (inclusive). Defaults to 30 days ago.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of the date range (exclusive). Defaults to end of today.

get.summary: Authenticated endpoint for tenant admins to view aggregate analytics.

post.summary:
Public endpoint that records a menu item view event.
No authentication required — this is called from the public menu page.
Always returns 204 NoContent regardless of success or failure
because analytics failures must never break the public page.

variantAMenuId.description: Optional. Defaults to MenuId (variant A is the original menu).

variantBConfig.description:
Accepts both a JSON string and a JSON object from the frontend.
Stored as a serialized JSON string in the database.

oauth2.description: Keycloak OAuth2 login (Authorization Code with PKCE)
